overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth action game showing a bald protagonist in tactical attire exploring a modern commercial kitchen. The character moves from a storage corridor with large wooden shelving into a main kitchen workspace where chefs are preparing food at various stations.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial kitchen storage corridor with shelving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the kitchen storage area toward the main workspace

notable_agents.action: chef standing at prep station preparing ingredients

entered.detail: stainless steel counter with various food ingredients and cooking supplies
tall wooden shelving unit filled with boxes and kitchen supplies
metal rack holding white plates and kitchenware
various vegetables and cooking ingredients arranged on the counter

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow commercial kitchen corridor flanked by a metal prep counter on the left and a tall wooden shelving unit on the right. A chef is visible working at a station on the right as the character moves toward the main kitchen area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial kitchen workspace with multiple prep stations

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the kitchen area

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the chefs working at their preparation stations

notable_agents.action: chef actively preparing food at the nearest counter
kitchen staff working at distant prep stations

entered.detail: metal preparation table with bowls of ingredients and cooking utensils
industrial cooking range with exhaust hood and multiple burners

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a halt at the entrance to the main kitchen workspace, observing the activity. Several chefs are visible working at prep stations, with stainless steel counters and cooking equipment filling the space. The wooden shelving and corridor counters are now behind the character as they survey the open kitchen area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined storage corridor into the expansive activity of a professional kitchen. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow passage flanked by a metal prep counter and tall wooden shelving, passing a chef working at a side station. As the character advances, the tight walls of the corridor give way to a wide entrance, shifting the perspective from a linear path to an open vantage point. The scene then expands to reveal the main workspace, where the camera halts to survey multiple chefs operating across a landscape of stainless steel counters and cooking equipment.
